subcodes.first_line: O thou who proclaimeth the Covenant throughout all regions, thy detailed and useful letter, comprehensive and convincing, which that illustrious person [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ینادی بالمیثاق فی الافاق نامه مفصل مفید و مشبع و مقنع که بانشخص جلیل
subcodes.subjects: @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @rejection, opposition and persecution
